item.title: [Segurança] F5 Patches Two Critical NGINX Open Source Flaws Enabling Remote Code Execution
item.description:
🚨 F5 Patches Two Critical NGINX Open Source Flaws Enabling Remote Code Execution
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.2
Resumo:
F5 has released security updates to address two critical security flaws in NGINX Open Source that could be exploited to achieve code execution on affected systems. The vulnerabilities are listed below - CVE-2026-42530 (CVSS v4 score: 9.2) - A use-after-free vulnerability in the ngx_http_v3_module that could be triggered by a remote unauthenticated attacker when NGINX Open Source is
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/f5-patches-two-critical-nginx-open.html

item.title: [Segurança] Apple Patches Beats Studio Buds Flaw Letting Nearby Attackers Spy via Microphone
item.description:
🚨 Apple Patches Beats Studio Buds Flaw Letting Nearby Attackers Spy via Microphone
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
Apple has updated its Beats Studio Buds wireless earbuds to patch a high-severity vulnerability that could be exploited by nearby hackers to eavesdrop on users. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2025-20701 (CVSS score: 8.8), refers to a case of incorrect authorization impacting the Airoha Bluetooth audio SDK that makes it possible to pair a Bluetooth audio device without user consent.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/apple-patches-beats-studio-buds-flaw.html

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8453-1: Net::CIDR::Lite vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8453-1: Net::CIDR::Lite vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that Net::CIDR::Lite incorrectly validated IP address and CIDR mask inputs. An attacker could possibly use this issue to bypass IP access control lists. (CVE-2026-45190) It was discovered that Net::CIDR::Lite incorrectly handled extraneous zero characters in CIDR mask values. An attacker could possibly use this issue to bypass IP access control lists.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8453-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8451-1: Vim vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8451-1: Vim vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Srinivas Piskala Ganesh Babu discovered that Vim incorrectly handled directory names when serializing browsed paths to the netrw history file. An attacker could possibly use this issue to execute arbitrary code. (CVE-2026-47162) It was discovered that Vim incorrectly handled step-definition patterns in the cucumber filetype plugin. An attacker could possibly use this issue to execute arbitrary code. (CVE-2026-47167)...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8451-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8450-1: Tomcat vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8450-1: Tomcat vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that Tomcat did not properly limit the size of WebDAV LOCK and PROPFIND request bodies. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to cause Tomcat to consume excessive memory, resulting in a denial of service. (CVE-2026-41284) It was discovered that Tomcat incorrectly validated HTTP/2 header fields. A remote attacker could use this issue to cause Tomcat to crash or possibly execute arbitrary co...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8450-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-10023 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-10023 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 4.3
Resumo:
The Dokan: AI Powered WooCommerce Multivendor Marketplace Solution – Build Your Own Amazon, eBay, Etsy plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Insecure Direct Object Reference in all versions up to, and including, 5.0.3 via the change_order_status, add_order_note, delete_order_note, add_shipping_tracking_info, grant_access_to_download, and revoke_access_to_download AJAX handlers due to missing ownership validation on a...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-10023

item.title: [Segurança] CISA: Splunk Enterprise flaw actively exploited, patch by Sunday
item.description:
💣 CISA: Splunk Enterprise flaw actively exploited, patch by Sunday
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
federal agencies to secure their systems by Sunday against a critical Splunk Enterprise vulnerability that is being exploited in attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-splunk-enterprise-flaw-actively-exploited-patch-by-sunday/

Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Nginx, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.

item.title: [Segurança] Gentlemen ransomware uses multiple EDR killers to disable defenses
item.description:
📰 Gentlemen ransomware uses multiple EDR killers to disable defenses
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Gentlemen ransomware-as-a-service (RaaS) is actively developing and maintaining a suite of endpoint detection and response (EDR) killers to help affiliates evade detection in attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/gentlemen-ransomware-uses-multiple-edr-killers-to-disable-defenses/

item.title: [Segurança] ThreatsDay Bulletin: Claude Chat Abuse, NastyC2 npm Packages, Device-Code Phishing + 25 More Stories
item.description:
📰 ThreatsDay Bulletin: Claude Chat Abuse, NastyC2 npm Packages, Device-Code Phishing + 25 More Stories
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It got used exactly as designed, which is worse. Searches were siphoned through shady browser add-ons. AI chat links turned into malware delivery paths. macOS attacks ran in memory and left almost nothing behind. Cloud agents looked like helpers until attackers treated them like open shells. Add exposed edge gear, poisoned packages, cash courier scams,
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/threatsday-bulletin-claude-chat-abuse.html

item.title: [Segurança] Klue OAuth breach linked to 'Icarus' Salesforce data theft attacks
item.description:
📰 Klue OAuth breach linked to 'Icarus' Salesforce data theft attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Market intelligence platform Klue suffered a OAuth breach that enabled the "Icarus" threat actors to steal Salesforce CRM data from multiple organizations in an ongoing extortion campaign.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/klue-oauth-breach-linked-to-icarus-salesforce-data-theft-attacks/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Building the Agentic SOC: A new model for financial services
item.description:
📰 Building the Agentic SOC: A new model for financial services
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: https://www.elastic.co/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
As AI-powered threats accelerate, financial institutions are evolving toward agentic security operations. Unified data, contextual intelligence, and operational resilience are becoming foundational to the future SOC.
Link: https://www.elastic.co/blog/agentic-soc-for-financial-services

item.title: [Infraestrutura] The Year the Sovereign Cloud Debate Got Specific
item.description:
📰 The Year the Sovereign Cloud Debate Got Specific
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
For four years, a single recurring conversation in Brussels has tracked the sovereign cloud debate from philosophical framework to legislative reality. The early years of Forum Europe’s European Sovereign Cloud Day asked the foundational questions — whether digital sovereignty was achievable, whether European providers could credibly compete, whether the regulatory architecture being assembled in the …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/19/the-year-the-sovereign-cloud-debate-got-specific/
